description_long: This is a compact, rectangular cabinet or shelf unit featuring a light wood body and a white marble-patterned top surface. The front side is open, revealing two spacious compartments separated by a single horizontal shelf, ideal for storing books, supplies, or small items. The sides and back are solid, with no visible openings, handles, or decorative features, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The marble-patterned top adds a touch of elegance and provides a durable, hard surface for placing objects. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a smooth finish. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A small, light wood cabinet or shelf with an open front and a white marble-patterned top, featuring two storage compartments and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: The open front view shows two compartments divided by a shelf, with the marble-patterned top clearly visible.
description_view_1: The solid side view displays the uninterrupted light wood panel and the marble-patterned top edge.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a solid wood back panel beneath the marble-patterned top, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing a plain wood panel and the marble-patterned top.
